function.name: _company_department_create
function.description: Create a new department in the company. Departments are used to organize employees and manage permissions.

oid.description: Department external identifier (optional). Must be unique within the company if provided.

name.description: Department name. Required and must be unique within the same parent department.

parentId.description: Parent department ID. If empty or not provided, the department will be created as a top-level department.

rowNumber.description: Display order number (optional). Lower numbers appear first.

ownerIdList.description: List of user IDs who are designated as department owners (optional).
